description_long: This is a large, irregularly shaped stone with a rugged, natural surface and a predominantly brown coloration. The stone features prominent white Cyrillic text painted across multiple faces, giving it a distinctive urban or artistic appearance. Its surface displays a mix of rough, pitted textures and some smoother, weathered patches, suggesting exposure to the elements. The edges are jagged and uneven, with one side appearing slightly fractured or chipped. The stone's mass and size indicate it would serve as a significant physical barrier in an urban environment. The painted text and natural form make it visually striking and likely to attract attention in its setting.
description: A large, rugged brown stone with jagged edges and prominent white Cyrillic text painted across its rough surface.
description_view_0: This view highlights the broadest face of the stone, showcasing the largest area of white Cyrillic text and the most visible surface texture.
description_view_1: This angle reveals a fractured edge and additional painted text, with more pronounced jagged features and a slightly concave area.
description_view_2: The side view emphasizes the stone's thickness and the continuation of the painted text, with less surface detail visible compared to other views.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the most irregular and rough side, with minimal text visible and a focus on the stone's natural, pitted texture.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on pavement or soil
attribute_pattern: Irregular mottling and pitting with bold, hand-painted Cyrillic text in white; no natural veining or layering visible.
attribute_weathering: Rough and weathered with some smoother patches, indicating moderate exposure to outdoor elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts sharply with man-made surfaces due to its natural form and painted text, likely standing out as an intentional feature or barrier.
